nasb.text: then the priest shall look at him, and if the scale has spread in the skin, the priest need not seek for the yellowish hair; he is unclean.

esv.text: then the priest shall examine him, and if the itch has spread in the skin, the priest need not seek for the yellow hair; he is unclean.

cnv.text: 祭司就要察看；如果發現癩痢在皮上蔓延，祭司不必找黃毛，他已經不潔淨。

ccb.text: 祭司就要再次检查。如果疥癣确已扩散，祭司不必再找黄毛，那人是不洁净的。
